description.short: Autonomous AI finance analyst powered by GPT-5 for analysis and reports.
description.full: Morgan is a Synthetic Worker - an autonomous digital finance employee powered by GPT-5 (Azure OpenAI). Morgan analyses budget vs actuals, identifies spending anomalies, generates board-ready reports, and posts weekly P&L briefings to your Finance Teams channel. Built on Microsoft Agent 365 with WorkIQ MCP tools including Mail, Teams, SharePoint, Word, and Calendar, plus a working Microsoft IQ showcase that combines Foundry IQ for model, knowledge, trace, and evaluation intelligence with Fabric IQ for financial figures and cross-functional business insights. Morgan can work proactively from 09:00 to 17:00, seven days a week, without being asked and is designed to integrate with other AI agents.
